title: I breathed new life into my vinyl with Fluance's RT87 turntable and while setup was finicky, it's well worth it for seasoned record collectors
summary: Nothing highlights the highs and lows of vinyl like a proper turn table such as the Fluance RT87. In short, I really enjoyed listening to the Fluance RT87.
